text:
今回の探索も有意義なものだった。
他では得がたい成果だ。

連携や支援、共闘でなければ
できぬ特訓をたくさん行えた。

今一度、基礎を見直すことのできる
実りある良い探索だった。

This excursion was also extremely valuable.
These results would be difficult to obtain
otherwise.

Coordination and support--it is impossible to
train in these aspects without a partner.

This was a good expedition that allowed us to
reflect on the fundamentals. I hope to be able
to work with you again.
